title: Dell security advisory (AV26-480)
description: Between May 11 and 17, 2026, Dell published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in multiple products:
products: Dell Enterprise Sonic Distribution - versions prior to 4.5.3
Dell Live Optics Collector) - versions prior to 27.1.10.1
Intel 800 Series Ethernet Adapters - versions prior to 30.5.0.13
Dell PowerEdge with AMD Graphics - multiple models and versions
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
